'''dhobachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:tubby|tubby]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-b-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tubby|tubby]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhobachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhobachithi|dhobachithi]] || [[word:dhobachiji|dhobachiji]] || [[word:dhobachishi|dhobachishi]] || [[word:dhobachiki|dhobachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhobachuthuthu|dhobachuthuthu]] || [[word:dhobachujuju|dhobachujuju]] || [[word:dhobachushushu|dhobachushushu]] || [[word:dhobachukuku|dhobachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhobachuthu|dhobachuthu]] || [[word:dhobachuju|dhobachuju]] || [[word:dhobachushu|dhobachushu]] || [[word:dhobachuku|dhobachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhobachufthuf|dhobachufthuf]] || [[word:dhobachufjuf|dhobachufjuf]] || [[word:dhobachufshuf|dhobachufshuf]] || [[word:dhobachufkuf|dhobachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhobachethe|dhobachethe]] || [[word:dhobacheje|dhobacheje]] || [[word:dhobacheshe|dhobacheshe]] || [[word:dhobacheke|dhobacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhobachothotho|dhobachothotho]] || [[word:dhobachojojo|dhobachojojo]] || [[word:dhobachoshosho|dhobachoshosho]] || [[word:dhobachokoko|dhobachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhobachotho|dhobachotho]] || [[word:dhobachojo|dhobachojo]] || [[word:dhobachosho|dhobachosho]] || [[word:dhobachoko|dhobachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhobachofthof|dhobachofthof]] || [[word:dhobachofjof|dhobachofjof]] || [[word:dhobachofshof|dhobachofshof]] || [[word:dhobachofkof|dhobachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhobachĂŻfthĂŻf|dhobachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhobachĂŻfjĂŻf|dhobachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhobachĂŻfshĂŻf|dhobachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhobachĂŻfkĂŻf|dhobachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhobachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dhobachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhobachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dhobachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhobachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dhobachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhobachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dhobachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhobachĂŻfthĂŻf|dhobachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhobachĂŻfjĂŻf|dhobachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhobachĂŻfshĂŻf|dhobachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhobachĂŻfkĂŻf|dhobachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhobachĂŻfthĂŻf|dhobachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhobachĂŻfjĂŻf|dhobachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhobachĂŻfshĂŻf|dhobachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhobachĂŻfkĂŻf|dhobachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhobachĂŠthĂŠ|dhobachĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dhobachĂŠjĂŠ|dhobachĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dhobachĂŠshĂŠ|dhobachĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dhobachĂŠkĂŠ|dhobachĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhobachathatha|dhobachathatha]] || [[word:dhobachajaja|dhobachajaja]] || [[word:dhobachashasha|dhobachashasha]] || [[word:dhobachakaka|dhobachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhobachatha|dhobachatha]] || [[word:dhobachaja|dhobachaja]] || [[word:dhobachasha|dhobachasha]] || [[word:dhobachaka|dhobachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhobachafthaf|dhobachafthaf]] || [[word:dhobachafjaf|dhobachafjaf]] || [[word:dhobachafshaf|dhobachafshaf]] || [[word:dhobachafkaf|dhobachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dhobachasha|dhobachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhobachshĂ«sha|dhobachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhobachrosha|dhobachrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhobachmusha|dhobachmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhobachyasha|dhobachyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhobachnkshĂ«sha|godhobachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhobachnkrosha|godhobachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhobachnkmusha|godhobachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhobachnkyasha|godhobachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dhobabachasha|dhobabachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhobabachshĂ«sha|dhobabachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhobabachrosha|dhobabachrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhobabachmusha|dhobabachmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhobabachyasha|dhobabachyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhobabachnkshĂ«sha|godhobabachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhobabachnkrosha|godhobabachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhobabachnkmusha|godhobabachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhobabachnkyasha|godhobabachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dhebĂŠchasha|dhebĂŠchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhebĂŠchshĂ«sha|dhebĂŠchshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhebĂŠchrosha|dhebĂŠchrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhebĂŠchmusha|dhebĂŠchmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhebĂŠchyasha|dhebĂŠchyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhebĂŠchnkshĂ«sha|godhebĂŠchnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhebĂŠchnkrosha|godhebĂŠchnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhebĂŠchnkmusha|godhebĂŠchnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhebĂŠchnkyasha|godhebĂŠchnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dhobfachasha|dhobfachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhobfachshĂ«sha|dhobfachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhobfachrosha|dhobfachrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhobfachmusha|dhobfachmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhobfachyasha|dhobfachyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhobfachnkshĂ«sha|godhobfachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhobfachnkrosha|godhobfachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhobfachnkmusha|godhobfachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhobfachnkyasha|godhobfachnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
